rounds.blurb: V-J Day in Times Square: a sailor's kiss as news of Japan's surrender breaks.
rounds.credit: Victor Jorgensen, U.S. Navy — public domain

rounds.blurb: Times Square, deserted at midday in the first spring of the pandemic.
The Space Needle rises over the Century 21 Exposition — the Seattle World's Fair.
Falcon Heavy's first flight leaves Pad 39A — with a Roadster for a payload.
Babe Ruth in his first season as a Yankee — the year the home run changed baseball.
